S.FORM: Tucker Albrizzi kawas tay 2000, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, Tucker Albrizzi, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Tucker Albrizzi kawas tay 2000, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 2, Tucker Albrizzi, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tuʦ~ʨker alβrizzi kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tuʦ~ʨker alβrizzi, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
